# Regex fixtures for skill: systematic-debugging
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH lines pin the hang word boundary: embedded hang (cHANGes,
# excHANGe, cHANGelog) must not fire the highest-priority process skill.

MATCH: debug the failing login flow
MATCH: the worker crashed with a segfault
MATCH: this hangs on startup
MATCH: memory leak in the cache layer
MATCH: tests are broken after the rebase

NO_MATCH: summarize the changes in this pr
NO_MATCH: update the changelog before we cut it
NO_MATCH: rename the exchange rate field
